message:
fix: add missing 'else' to shell control keywords

The shell extractor was missing 'else' in the is_shell_control_line()
function, which would cause standalone 'else' lines in shell scripts
to be incorrectly extracted as commands.

Also includes:
- Handle RUN\t (tab) in Dockerfile extractor
- Add tests for both fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
